chunks.title: Moses Addresses Israel
chunks.reason: Moses announces his age and the Lord's command regarding the Jordan.

chunks.title: Charge to Joshua
chunks.reason: Moses encourages Joshua before all Israel to lead the people.

chunks.title: Reading the Law Every Seven Years
chunks.reason: Moses instructs the priests and elders on the periodic public reading of the law.

chunks.title: Commissioning at the Tent of Meeting
chunks.reason: Narrative of Moses and Joshua appearing before the Lord to commission Joshua.

chunks.title: Moses' Final Charge to Elders
chunks.reason: Moses commands the Levites and gathers elders to witness his final words.

chunks.title: Singing the Song
chunks.reason: Moses recites the song to the assembly of Israel.
